hard_constraints: Ports: Agent API :8095, Deal API :8090, vLLM :8000, RAG REST :8052, MCP :9100, Langfuse :3001
Model: Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct-AWQ via vLLM (OpenAI-compatible) with --tool-call-parser hermes; max context 32768
Orchestration: LangGraph with PostgresSaver checkpointing; HITL via interrupt_before=['approval_gate']; must pass kill -9 recovery
Tools: Hybrid MCP + Direct; required Direct tools: list_deals, get_deal, transition_deal, check_health
Permissions: READ/WRITE/CRITICAL with approval required for CRITICAL tools
Idempotency: claim-first (INSERT before execute) for WRITE/CRITICAL; strict Pydantic validation on tool args
Storage: Postgres + pgvector; audit_log immutable; checkpoints TTL 30 days; DLQ required
Queue: Postgres SKIP LOCKED; backoff 30s*2^attempt; max_attempts=3; P95 claim latency <100ms under load; Redis migration trigger P95>500ms under 1000 tasks
Observability: Langfuse (self-hosted) + OpenTelemetry; never log raw prompts/responses (hash+length only); retention 30 days
Security: JWT primary (HS256) + X-API-Key fallback; required claims sub/role/exp/iss/aud; iss=zakops-auth aud=zakops-agent; default deny
Routing: LiteLLM deterministic; cloud fallback local->cloud-claude; blocked fields ssn/tax_id/bank_account/credit_card; daily budget $50; >=80% tasks local
Retrieval: single retrieval path; RAG REST is the exclusive retrieval frontend; no direct pgvector queries from Agent API

phases.name: Phase 0 — Preserve Baseline + Prevent Regression
dod: All baseline gate_artifacts are produced with PASS markers

phases.name: Phase 1 — MVP Surface Completion
dod: PORTS.md exists and is enforced by gates
Direct tools list_deals/get_deal/check_health are implemented with strict schemas and audited
Self-hosted Langfuse health at :3001 passes and trace is created
24h soak passes with recorded PASS markers

phases.name: Phase 2 — Production Hardening
dod: Postgres queue + worker + DLQ pass smoke and load tests
API key fallback works; keys are stored hashed only
audit_log immutability is enforced at DB level
PII canary not present in logs/traces/DB

phases.name: Phase 4 — Hybrid Routing + Egress/Budget Controls
dod: >=80% tasks handled locally on measured test set

phases.name: Phase 5 — ABAC + Advanced Policy
dod: ABAC policy tests pass and approval decisions are audited

top_risks.title: Plaintext persistence of confidential content (checkpoints/tool args/results)
top_risks.mitigation: Implement PII canary gates across logs/traces/DB; store hashes/summaries; define production fail-closed mode if raw content detected

top_risks.title: Idempotency regressions causing duplicate side effects
top_risks.mitigation: Deterministic sha256 idempotency keys + claim-first inserts; keep concurrency exactly-once gate as non-negotiable

top_risks.title: Crash recovery regressions
top_risks.mitigation: Run kill -9 recovery gate on every phase; reject changes that break checkpoint resume

top_risks.title: Langfuse not self-hosted / missing traceability
top_risks.mitigation: Provision self-hosted Langfuse on :3001 and gate health + trace creation before declaring MVP complete

top_risks.title: Cloud egress leakage under hybrid routing
top_risks.mitigation: Blocked-field enforcement with fail-closed behavior; policy tests; require explicit allow conditions

open_questions.question: What are the canonical Deal API endpoints/schemas for list_deals/get_deal/transition_deal?
open_questions.test: Implement and run a contract probe that records HTTP paths, status codes, and minimal response schema into gate_artifacts

open_questions.question: What is the exact RAG REST contract (health + query endpoints + response schema)?
open_questions.test: Implement and run retrieval_contract_test.sh to probe endpoints and store a contract artifact

open_questions.question: Where will zakops_agent DB live in workstation mode: host Postgres :5432 or internal compose Postgres?
open_questions.test: Document selected mode and prove connectivity from inside the Agent container using psql; store output artifact

open_questions.question: What at-rest representation (scrub/encrypt) preserves LangGraph crash recovery while meeting no-raw-content requirements?
open_questions.test: Prototype the approach and re-run bring_up_tests.sh kill-9 + concurrency gates; accept only if recovery is 100%
